title: C++ Import Implementation Plan
summary: Task-by-task implementation plan for letting Verb programs import and call extern C++ library functions via a shared VerbValue ABI struct.
notes: Structured as an implementation plan (waves, tasks, TDD steps) rather than a decision record, requirements doc, or technical contract spec, so it falls under DOC (context/process document). It references a companion SPEC doc which should be classified separately and likely holds the actual locked design decisions.
